description.zh-Hans: 生成马赛克/镶嵌瓷砖图案，带有彩色方形单元格、可配置的填缝宽度、逐块颜色变化和可选表面着色。支持网格、砖砌和菱形布局。所有噪波均可平铺以实现无缝输出。
description.en: Generates mosaic / tessellated tile patterns with colored square cells, configurable grout/gap width, per-tile color variation, and optional surface shading. Supports grid, brick-bond, and diamond layouts. All noise is tileable for seamless output.

triggers.zh-Hans: 马赛克, 镶嵌, 瓷砖, 拼花, 装饰, 墙面装饰
triggers.en: mosaic, tessellation, tile, inlay, decorative, wall art

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成彩色马赛克瓷砖纹理，用于装饰性墙面或地面铺装。
exampleUsage.en: Generate colorful mosaic tile textures for decorative walls or floor tiling.
